description: Sports, fitness, coaching and performance careers.

careers.name: Professional Athlete
careers.overview: Professional Athlete is a sports career focused on performance, coaching, health, fitness, competition and sports management.
careers.whyChoose: Professional Athlete offers active work, growing sports industry, fitness awareness and opportunities beyond professional playing.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream; fitness, sports science, coaching or physical education qualifications help.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> Sports training/degree/certification -> Competition/internship -> Sports or fitness role.
careers.workEnvironment: Sports academies, schools, fitness centers, clubs, teams, leagues, media organizations and wellness companies.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to sports leagues, fitness culture, sports science and performance analytics.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support performance tracking and analytics, while coaching judgement and physical skill remain human-centered.
topColleges: Lakshmibai National Institute of Physical Education
